title: psilanthus fragrans
intro: Psilanthus fragrans, also known as the Indian laburnum or amaltas, is a flowering plant native to the Indian subcontinent. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Psilanthus fragrans include its potential to help manage diabetes, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Psilanthus fragrans include teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
